title: The Confluence Where Disagreements Merge

features.name: plural pools
features.desc-on-touch: three streams converge here, and each pool holds a different depth of water — one knows the ravine's version of events, one the tributary's, one the water's own truth, and they will never reconcile

features.name: disagreement marker
features.desc-on-touch: a cairn built by competing hands — the stones don't align, they're stacked at angles that mean argument, that mean two people can build the same thing and have it mean opposite directions

features.name: tree-count tangle
features.desc-on-touch: trees here are impossible to number — they stand overlapped, their roots forming the pools and the pools forming the counts, each tree keeping its own true number that the archive cannot reconcile

features.name: witness junction
features.desc-on-touch: where the paths split and split again — you can walk to three different confluences from this one point, each one a different story, all of them true at once

features.name: song-memory glyph
features.desc-on-touch: marks on stones where two voices carved at once — one singing down, one singing up, and where they met the stone learned to hold both frequencies without choosing

inscription: ERROR: archive has exceeded witness — each voice here keeps its own true count, and the counts don't reconcile, but here they pour into larger water anyway

file.name: Tree_Count_Discrepancies_Three_Ravines.txt
file.note: field observation: why three independent counts of the same stand range from 47 to 63 to 52 trees — not error, but three true things at once, and the archive cannot hold all three as its single truth

reverie.title: REVERIE — counting stones at the water's join
narr: you kneel at the confluence with stones in your hands,
counting as the water moves. she counts on the other bank.
your numbers differ. the water flows through both your counts
at once. she looks up and shrugs — not defeat, but the smile
that means: the archive is bigger than its instruments. the
water keeps singing its own truer total underneath.

exits.label: back upstream where the voices sing separately
into the larger water where all counts pour and merge
